## Title: Fix scheduling priority inversion in nfapi_vnf_phy_info_list

### Summary
The `nfapi_vnf_phy_info_list_add` function was inserting new PHY info entries at the head of the linked list (LIFO order). Since `nfapi_vnf_phy_info_list_find` traverses from head to tail, this caused a scheduling priority inversion where recently added entries would be served before older ones, regardless of their intended priority. In practice, this meant lower-priority traffic could preempt higher-priority tra
